evals.prompt: Map out the integrations for our E-commerce backend. It connects to Stripe for payments (REST API), SendGrid for emails (SMTP), and an internal Inventory Service (gRPC).
evals.expected_output: Integration diagram showing protocols and system boundaries.
expectations: Identifies the core E-commerce backend system
Includes external integrations: Stripe, SendGrid, Inventory Service
Labels connections with integration protocols (REST, SMTP, gRPC)
Uses Mermaid graph to visually represent the topology

evals.prompt: Document our third-party integrations, specifically highlighting synchronous vs asynchronous connections and data ownership.
evals.expected_output: Integration map focusing on coupling and data flows.
expectations: Distinguishes between sync and async connections
Indicates data ownership or flow direction
Provides a tabular summary alongside the diagram for clarity
Highlights boundaries between internal and third-party systems
